name: @nube/genui
description: A reusable, renderer-agnostic generative-UI layer for React — the Lazybones 'agent authors a widget' machinery. A versioned, A2UI-shaped internal representation (IR) is the persisted contract; emission formats (OpenUI Lang now) are authoring-time adapters that parse INTO the IR; a trusted catalog renders it. Two strata: the RENDER stratum (ir/ + catalog/ + react/) every viewer loads (parser-free, deterministic), and the AUTHORING stratum (adapters/ + normalize/) the builder loads. Self-themed via scoped `--gu-*` tokens under `.gu-root`, host-overridable. Imports nothing from ui/src — the host injects a bridge-shaped call/watch seam.
